title: On kernel 5.16.0 podman is unable to switch from `overlay` to `fuse-overlayfs`
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST?**

/kind bug

**Description**

This came up as part of discussion on [this issue](https://github.com/containers/fuse-overlayfs/issues/337). When using `mount_program = "/usr/bin/fuse-overlayfs"` on kernel 5.16.0, podman does not make use of it, as can be seen by the `graphOptions: {}` line in `podman info --debug` output.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. Make sure you have kernel `5.16.0` or higher
2. Uncomment `mount_program = "/usr/bin/fuse-overlayfs"` line in `/etc/containers/storage.conf`
3. Reset podman with `podman system reset -f` *(**WARNING**: this will remove all images)*
4. Execute `podman info --debug | grep fuse-overlayfs`

**Describe the results you received:**

There is no output.

**Describe the results you expected:**

There will be some output.

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
Version:      3.4.4
API Version:  3.4.4
Go Version:   go1.17.4
Git Commit:   f6526ada1025c2e3f88745ba83b8b461ca659933
Built:        Thu Dec  9 21:30:40 2021
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```

Yes

comments.body: If you run podman info as root, does it show up?
that is expected. `/etc/containers/storage.conf` is for root, not rootless.  If you want to configure it for rootless you need to set it in `~/.config/containers/storage.conf`
please reopen if it is still not working after you set `~/.config/containers/storage.conf`
Thank you, setting it in `~/.config/containers/storage.conf` worked!
